Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class RecordActionDeployment

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.RecordActionDeployment
public class RecordActionDeployment extends Metadata

Java class for RecordActionDeployment complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="RecordActionDeployment">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="channelConfigurations" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecordActionDeploymentChannel" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="componentName" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ComponentName" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deploymentContexts" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecordActionDeploymentContext" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="hasGuidedActions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="hasOmniscripts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="hasRecommendations" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="recommendation" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecordActionRecommendation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="selectableItems" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RecordActionSelectableItem" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getChannelConfigurations

      public List<RecordActionDeploymentChannel> getChannelConfigurations()
      Gets the value of the channelConfigurations property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the channelConfigurations property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getChannelConfigurations().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list RecordActionDeploymentChannel

      Returns:
      The value of the channelConfigurations property.

    • getComponentName

      public ComponentName getComponentName()
      Gets the value of the componentName property.
      Returns:
      possible object is ComponentName

      public void setComponentName(ComponentName value)
      Sets the value of the componentName property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is ComponentName

    • getDeploymentContexts

      public List<RecordActionDeploymentContext> getDeploymentContexts()
      Gets the value of the deploymentContexts property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the deploymentContexts property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDeploymentContexts().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list RecordActionDeploymentContext

      Returns:
      The value of the deploymentContexts property.

    • getSelectableItems

      public List<RecordActionSelectableItem> getSelectableItems()
      Gets the value of the selectableItems property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the selectableItems property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getSelectableItems().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list RecordActionSelectableItem

      Returns:
      The value of the selectableItems property.
